examples: She was twirling her hair absentmindedly.
"What?" he asked, absentmindedly. She did not answer.
She absentmindedly played with some hairs which clung to the comb.
Later, she absentmindedly emptied the contents of that purse into the collection cup of Billy Ray Harris, who is homeless and often stays under a bridge in Darling's hometown.
" "People who grab food when they happen to think about it or absentmindedly snack instead of taking the time to sit down and eat don't do as well with diet quality and weight maintenance.
